data.body: Remaining after the apply (both need a decision/human step, so NOT done autonomously): (1) EMAIL CONFIRM — the aws_sns_topic_subscription.alerts_email is PendingConfirmation; the confirmation link to joeoakhart@navapbc.com must be clicked (I have no inbox access). Durable alternative to stop this recurring: switch the sink to a confirmation-free protocol (AWS Chatbot/Slack, HTTPS, or SQS+Lambda) — needs a channel/endpoint choice. (2) TERRAFORM CI — recommended design: a GitHub Actions workflow that runs 'terraform plan' (drift detection) on changes under infra/terraform/ and fails on un-applied drift, authenticating via a GitHub OIDC role in account 896586841071 (needs an aws_iam_openid_connect_provider + role with a repo-scoped trust policy). This is a standalone infra project (OIDC setup), larger than this bug's scope; filing it as the durable prevention rather than building it inline. The two ACTUAL gaps in this ticket (3 undeployed alarms; missing subscription resource) are RESOLVED by the terraform apply.
